sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Operator Profile & Basin Positioning
required_elements: Energy value chain classification (upstream E&P, integrated major, midstream, downstream, oilfield services)
Upstream acreage portfolio mapping by basin with percentage of production breakdown
Reserve classification (1P/2P/3P) with reserve replacement ratio (RRR) assessment
Management capital allocation philosophy and evolution across commodity cycles

sections.title: Subsurface-to-Surface Economics — The Reserves-to-Value Bridge
required_elements: Finding & development cost (F&D) vs. commodity price economic viability analysis
Breakeven WTI/Brent price assessment (maintenance capex and dividend coverage)
Decline curve economics and base decline rate of existing production portfolio
Maintenance CapEx vs. growth CapEx split (% consumed by maintenance)
Netback analysis by basin vs. peers
Reserves life index assessment (risk of inventory exhaustion)

sections.title: Macro & Commodity Cycle Positioning
required_elements: Commodity cycle positioning analysis (inventory/demand balance, OPEC+ spare capacity, forward curve)
Hedging book assessment (% of near-term production hedged, hedge prices, volatility vs. direction protection)
Price move impact on annual FCF (sensitivity to $10/bbl change)
Energy transition exposure (low-carbon CapEx %, reserve base duration vs. demand destruction timeline)

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/DACF, EV/2P reserves, and FCF yield valuation frameworks
Sum-of-the-parts for integrated majors
Commodity scenario modeling (FCF, dividend sustainability, debt covenant compliance at $50-90 WTI)

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Reserve revision tracking (downward revisions indicate overstated asset base)
SEC PV-10 vs. market cap gap analysis (value trap or hidden value indicator)
Production guidance cuts disguised as 'capital discipline'
Insider buying/selling patterns vs. commodity price movements

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Well-level productivity analysis (IP30/IP90 rates by vintage)
Water disposal cost trajectory (emerging ESG and operational risk)
Midstream contract renegotiation exposure

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Reserve classification (1P/2P/3P) explicitly stated with RRR calculated over 3 years
F&D cost calculated and benchmarked against commodity price
Breakeven WTI/Brent price determined with maintenance CapEx and dividend visibility
Decline curve base decline rate documented with maintenance vs. growth CapEx split
Hedging book detailed (% of production hedged, hedge price levels, timeframe coverage)
Energy transition CapEx allocation quantified with reserve depletion vs. demand destruction timeline
Scenario analysis presents FCF, dividend sustainability, and covenant compliance at multiple WTI prices
Reserve revision history tracked (3-5 year trend)
Insider transaction patterns documented relative to commodity cycles
